# CAT-G-008 - Maori Agribusiness & Whenua Funding Cluster

| Field | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Primary portals** | MPI MABx; Whenua Kokiri / tupu.nz (40+ funds) |
| **MABx URL** | https://www.mpi.govt.nz/funding-rural-support/maori-agribusiness-funding-support/maori-agribusiness-extension-mabx-programme |
| **Whenua search** | https://www.tupu.nz/en/kokiri/search-for-funding-opportunities/ |
| **Status** | **Researching** - multi-fund, region-specific |
| **Fit score** | **75** with the right whenua / cluster partner |

## What this is

Not a single grant. A **cluster** of extension programmes and whenua development funds for Maori landowners and agribusinesses. CAT enters as **technology + sovereignty architecture partner**, not as extractive vendor.

## CAT value proposition to clusters

- Offline edge nodes for remote whenua 
- Soil / water / biosecurity domain agents 
- Local data residency (Te Mana Raraunga) 
- Dual-platform install (Windows farm office + Linux edge)

## Next steps

1. Cultural Advisor leads relationship approach 
2. Filter tupu.nz for **Taranaki** + nationwide digital / productivity funds 
3. If MABx cluster forms, offer pilot kit BOM (RPi 5 16GB + Hailo-10H)
